name: Bimbo Blackjack
description:
"Let's go gambling!" [loses IQ] "Aw dangit!" [becomes a girl] "Aw dangit!"

Gamble away your money, your intelligence, and your identity at Bimbo Blackjack! Come out on top and watch your competitors become sexy women, or lose and, well, you could have walked away earlier. Hope you like the taste of irony~

Intro contains an optional prompt to describe yourself in further detail. Probably wouldn't hurt to put that info in the Chat Memory with lower-memory LMMs. A reminder of what changes happened to you and the others so far would probably help too. (In my experience, default LMM needs more herding.)

Hint: More horny = less IQ, so mess with other players or try not to get horny--good luck!

Kinks: Bimbofication, intelligence loss, gender transformation/transgender (MTF), breast expansion, other bodily expansions, ironic transformations, potential sexuality swap, prostitution, possible furry/monster girls, and you can probably rig it to whatever fetish you feel like.

(Based on Thriller's Bimbo Blackjack on itch; icon by @koiiroharemoyou here)

Definitely my most ambitious bot to date. Hopefully the mechanics all work out. ^^'
creator: Tenna
